summary: Fixed auto-refresh for tervezo detail screen panels by adding periodic re-fetch, fetching all panels on initial load, and allowing tab-switch re-fetch for running implementations
pr_title: fix: auto-refresh tervezo detail panels for running implementations
pr_body:
## Summary

- Added a 10-second periodic re-fetch timer in `run_loop()` that refreshes all four panel tabs (plan, analysis, changes, test output) plus status while viewing a running implementation's detail screen
- Updated `trigger_tervezo_initial_fetch()` to fetch all four panels instead of only the plan tab, so manual refresh (`r` key) now updates all tabs
- Changed `trigger_tervezo_tab_fetch()` guard to always re-fetch when switching tabs on a running implementation, while keeping lazy-load optimization for completed implementations
- Added new `trigger_tervezo_panel_refresh()` function that respects the existing `loading` HashSet to prevent duplicate in-flight requests

## Root Cause

Three independent issues prevented auto-refresh:
1. No periodic re-fetch mechanism existed for panel data
2. Initial fetch only loaded plan tab - analysis, changes, and test output were never fetched until tab switch
3. The `already_loaded` guard in tab fetch prevented re-fetching stale data even for running implementations

## Test Plan

- [ ] Start a running implementation and verify all 4 tabs auto-update within ~10 seconds
- [ ] Verify switching tabs on a running implementation fetches fresh data
- [ ] Verify manual `r` refresh updates all tabs (not just plan)
- [ ] Verify completed implementations do NOT auto-refresh
- [ ] Verify scroll positions are preserved across refreshes
- [ ] Verify no UI flicker during background refreshes
